form.formComment: She is resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation ninth of 14 at Randwick 3yo Mdn December 26 over 1400m, 6 len behind Cellarmaster with 58kg at $14. On debut third of 8 at Newcastle F&M Mdn November 1 over 1300m, soft track; 1.75 len behind Rosa Incanta with 57.5kg at $6. Returns with the two trials and stays in the mix.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 37 day let-up. Most recently 4th of 10 at Canberra Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 1300m, slow going 2.75 len behind Your Chilli with 59kg at $4.20. The race before that 3rd of 8 at Warwick Farm Mdn on February 4 over 1400m, slow going 1.4 len behind Feminino carrying 56.5kg at $9. Working towards a win and kept up to the mark with an 816m trial, sure to be thereabouts.
